feedback.text: Sometimes people have to buy their software illegally, as the manufacturer no longer offers it for sale, even if this person would then pay for it. I do not find Okay that Studios take me away from my purchased software (video games such as ‘The Crew’) even though you are still in a playable state or could be turned into a permanent playable state. Hello, I am very interested in the destruction of video games. This feels like theft! Unavailability of old video games is also a problem. And why the studios are allowed to delete them from my digital libraries at all. In turn, very old games are also affected.
